creative_hooks: Start class with two buckets: one full of muddy water and one empty. Ask students how to make the muddy water drinkable.
Show a picture of an ancient stepwell (Kalyani) and ask why kings built them centuries ago.
group_activities: DIY Filter: Give groups sand, gravel, and cotton to build a mini water filter in a plastic bottle.
Roof Mapping: Have students draw their own house roof and map where rain flows to design a harvesting pipe system.
local_connections: Connect to the Karnataka monsoon season.
Discuss local lakes that have dried up and how rainwater harvesting could save them.
